notes: The WSGI library under Flask, German for "tool" ‚Äî Pallets' own project page says so. German spelling trips up English readers four ways: W is a V, z is "ts", eu is "oy", and the final g devoices to a k, giving "VERK-tsoyk". The common English readings "WERK-zoog" and "WORK-zeeg" are simply wrong.
